properties.name: Gina
properties.description: Osteria Gina features nine tables with a view of the sea and pine forest. Everything here begins with a foundation in natural wines, along with a menu that pairs perfectly with them.
reviews: The most unique place I have ever dined in. The owner cooks, serves and is so personal. Only dines a couple guests in his home and need a reservation to eat but worth it. One of the most memorable and amazing dinners I have ever had. If you love unique places, great food, and amazing atmosphere.

The food was delicious! The steak melted in your mouth and the restaurant itself had a lovely warm atmosphere. Try the lavender ice cream - delicious! Maybe not the cheapest but well worth it. Staff were also great - friendly, helpful and offered recommendations

Had a wonderful dinner at cosy and rustic Osteria Gina. Being warmly welcomed by the Chef he offered us three choises from fish and meat list. I chose pork neck and filet while my partner had fish. Both choises were delicious, as was also the red and white wine. We left happily after grappas from the House and interesting discussions with the Chef.

properties.name: Kažun
properties.description: A rustic Istrian-style restaurant in a casual setting, offering traditional meat and fish dishes, homemade pasta, and local specialties, including its signature grilled steak.
reviews: When I say this was the best meal of my life, I truly mean it! The food was absolutely delicious, and the service was outstanding. The steak in particular was incredible—I highly recommend it. This was by far one of the best dining experiences I’ve ever had. If you’re visiting Pula, you must come here. If you don’t, you’re seriously missing out!
Charming restaurant with excellent seafood. We got the platter for two - guys really you have to try it. The chard was top here, fresh and tasty.
Good food at the edge of Pula, friendly staff as well. Had a truffle pasta and a fresh cabbage (kupus) salad here, with real Istrian truffles. Delicious!

properties.name: Amfiteatar
reviews: Awesome dinner experience. For starters we had beef carpaccio and Croatian pasta with truffles. For our main courses we had grilled seabass and beefsteak with truffles. Everything was awesome and the waitstaff was very attentive to our table. Everyone should stop by when they are open. You won't be disappointed.

We enjoyed our vegan salads. The sunflower seed nuggets were really tasty. Though the actual salad was pretty boring and the menu said it came with loads of stuff it didn't (carrot, guacamole pea etc...).

properties.name: Smoked
properties.description: A casual BBQ restaurant with a terrace, offering smoked and grilled meats, burgers, ribs, steaks, vegan options, desserts, and a good selection of drinks.
reviews: Amazing experience on this restaurant..the food was perfect,meat was more than impressive from the quality to the way of been cooked.service was also perfect but the food..the food was more than everything..
Awesome place! The platter for two was super tasty and the crème brûlée was just perfect. Everything was great — definitely coming back next time we’re in Pula!

We had a fantastic experience at Smoked Bar & BBQ in Pula. The food was outstanding – cooked to perfection, beautifully presented, and full of rich, smoky flavours. Every dish had great attention to detail and was bursting with taste. The service was equally impressive: friendly, attentive, and made the whole evening feel really relaxed and welcoming. If you’re in Pula and love quality BBQ with excellent flavours and presentation, this is definitely a spot worth visiting!

properties.name: Giardino Bar
properties.description: A cozy café in the center of Pula, ideal for coffee, ice cream, drinks, and a relaxing break.
reviews: Nice place, great drink (teragino), the music wasn't loud, so it wasn't a problem to hear each other. And we got free chips and nuts with the drink.
Great location and atmosphere and an extremely polite and helpful waiter, a real refreshment!
Good music, delicious coffee, even a vegan milk option, and clean bathrooms.

properties.name: Pizzeria Asterix
properties.description: A long-standing pizzeria in Pula, known for wood-fired pizzas, quality ingredients, gluten-free options, and reliable delivery.
reviews: The pizzas are super delicious, the service is friendly and the terrace is beautiful. We especially enjoyed the pizza Asterix where you can combine 3 kinds of flavours in one pizza.

I had a great experience at this restaurant. The pizza was delicious, well-prepared, and nicely presented. The service was friendly and attentive, and the atmosphere made the meal even more enjoyable. Prices were reasonable for the quality offered. Overall, I would definitely recommend this place.
Best value quality pizza in Pula?! Very nice staff, promises 15-20 minutes, delivers in 10 minutes. Worth the detour! 🙏🏼🥇

properties.name: Sandwich Club
properties.description: A casual fast-food diner in Pula, offering fresh snacks and meals, outdoor seating, vegan and vegetarian options, and a kids’ corner.
reviews: Good fast food with burger options, sandwiches and unique dishes. Friendly staff, fast service. Tables also outside and takeaway. Good value for money.
I had a wonderful experience at this restaurant. The dishes were delicious and reasonably priced. The staff was very friendly and attentive. I will definitely be coming back!

Stopped in at Sandwich Club 🥪 yesterday before heading to Aquarium Pula. The food was excellent (try the Cubanito, they have nice Coffee too ☕), the service fantastic (staff were very friendly & good company) & the atmosphere was great (the Spotify playlist having been expertly selected by the team). Couldn't find fault with this place at all - great value for a very reasonable price.

properties.name: Bistro Odisej
properties.description: A casual grill restaurant with a terrace, offering hearty meat dishes, burgers, barbecue specialties, and a comfortable setting for relaxed dining.
reviews: We were welcomed the minute we sat down. Got the menus and she took the order after a few minutes of deciding what to eat. We chose the mean plate for 2. When we got it it was huge. Took some time to finish for sure. It tasted great. I can only recommend.

First of all, best service ever! You are really friendly greated here and get all the recommendations you need from beer over food. We had the grill plate for two persons and we couldn' finish it. A lot of meat, fresh typical bread, fries and dips. You can get a taste of croatia over here! Recommended!
Big generous portions of freshly grilled meat - exactly what you need for a traditional lunch in a place not filled with tourists.

properties.name: Bistro Cementara
properties.description: A casual local bistro, offering affordable daily lunch menus, homemade dishes, seafood and meat specialties, and relaxed dining.
reviews: Very good food and very affordable! It feels very local but there isn't a lot to see around so go there if you're on a walk. Also the waitress was very helpful and cute. 10/10 would go again

Our accommodation was nearby, so we ended up here by chance. The tomato salad, rump steak with pepper sauce and fries (€13), and the tagliatelle with truffles (€15) were all excellent and very tasty. The prices are absolutely unbeatable. The staff is super friendly. You sit on a small terrace overlooking a parking lot. That's the only downside. Otherwise, a definite thumbs up for authentic, delicious Croatian cuisine.

A hidden gem in the Docklands. Simple, but the food is fantastic and beautifully presented. We had grilled fish, calamari, and truffle pasta. The service was also very friendly (only Croatian spoken).

properties.name: Pizzeria Diego
properties.description: A casual pizzeria offering a wide variety of pizzas, along with pasta, desserts, and selected grill dishes.
reviews: The former pizzeria Samantha in a new location with the same widely known pizzas. Excellent pizzas, cozy interior design and a great team that serves. The pizzas are big and delicious, the recommendation goes for their calzone and fantasia. Normal prices.

What a great find. Short distance from the centre of Pula. I had a delicious truffle pasta which was a really generous portion for the price. The vegan pizza was also very good. Service is nice as well here.
Best food for that price, no just pizzas. Excelent and friendly service. Good outdoor ambient for smokers. Very big problem with parking.

properties.name: Boccaporta
properties.description: A traditional Istrian tavern, known for local specialties, generous portions, seafood and meat dishes, and a warm, family-style atmosphere.
reviews: Been here for 2 nights in a row. Lots of seafood choices. We ordered scallops and pasta with cuttlefish and mushrooms. One of the best meal I ever had. House white wine is really nice.

Thoughtful Service, we had a small child with us and were given some books/games to entertain him. We tasted the veal shank which was juicy and tasty (as well as abundant). During dinner we were enlivened by live music, guitar and accordion, pleasant and not at all intrusive. We will return

Very friendly waiter who helped us choose delicious dishes from the menu. The beef cheek gnocci was excellent, meat was so tender with a perfectly rich sauce. The cuttlefish pasta was interesting with a well balanced sauce. However, the star of the whole meal was the tiramisu - probably the best dessert I've had this year, I couldn't stop talking about it during our whole Europe trip.

properties.name: Pizzeria Marco Polo
properties.description: A casual pizzeria and bistro serving a wide variety of pizzas, pasta, gnocchi, ravioli, salads, and selected grilled meat dishes.
reviews: Excellent. Friendly service and very moderate prices. They offer three different sizes: S = 27 cm, M = 33 cm and L, which seems to be significantly larger. We recommend!

I’ve visited several times already and always gladly return to this place. The food is very tasty, especially the pizzas, which are probably among the best in the city. The rest of the menu is just as good. Food, pleasant atmosphere, and service — a solid 5/5!

Extremely tasteful pizza cooked to perfection in a restaurant with good atmosphere. I would wholeheartedly recommend the Pizza Siciliana with artichokes, small prawns/shrimp. Tried a few pizzas elsewhere but this one is honestly the best! Plus very reasonable prices and great service. 5-10 mins walk from city centre but well worth it! Pizza was so good I could only take a photo after it disappeared;)

properties.name: Pizzeria Tivoli
properties.description: A spacious pizzeria in Veli Vrh neighborhood, set within a sports complex and offering a wide variety of pizzas, pasta, salads, and family-friendly dining.
reviews: Loved it! Delicious pizza and really good tiramisu. The staff was really nice as well. I was surprised how big this place is. Will come back for sure.

Traveled a lot all around europe, tried gazzilion pasta and pizza places: this place has to be one of the BEST ever! Fine selection of pizza and pasta dishes. Quick service. Nice selection of additional olive oils and parmesan. My warmest recommendation.

An excellent pizzeria, would definitely recommend. Great atmosphere - staff are friendly, incredibly busy, rushing around bringing food/drinks - service was impeccable and really well coordinated. There was a great variety of pizzas to choose from. We chose some of the local options, alongside some classics. A really popular place that is suitable for the whole family. There’s even a play area for the kids.

properties.name: Restaurant Oaza
properties.description: A family-run restaurant in Pula, about 2 km from the city center, known for Istrian specialties, fresh seafood, meat dishes, and handmade pasta. With a long tradition, a relaxed atmosphere, and ingredients sourced from local fishermen and farmers, it is a great choice for authentic regional dining.
reviews: Walking along Pula Bay to get here... What a great service! A pleasant lady who does the service and does her best to make the most of it, and she succeeds! The anti pasti of meat was super tasty! I couldn't eat gluten so they changed the dish from pasta to rice with vongole! Super tasty... My husband ate slow-cooked lamb, which was even better and even the fried potatoes were delicious and well seasoned! Completely to our tooth! And as icing on the cake, gluten-free dessert was made à la minute because they don't actually have this! Blessed just!
Stopped here for a quick lunch, everything was good. Nice and helpful waitresses, we have left a phone there by mistake and when we came back for it theye were waiting for us. Thank you again!

It was good food. The only thing is if u want the lamb on Thursday come earlier, then we did. we were there at 14.00 and it was sold out . As appetizers, we had the wooden plate (meats and such) and octopus salad. Both were pretty good, just good food, no fuss For mains, i took the daily dish that was cuttlefish with black risotto. The risotto was perfect. I never had cuttlefish before it wasn't really for me, it tasted good but didn't like the structure of it . but that's my preference . My wife had the vongole pasta, and she thought it was delicious. Overall, it is one of our better experiences on our holiday.

properties.name: Pizzeria Samantha
properties.description: A modern pizzeria in Pula’s industrial zone, known for Neapolitan-style pizzas with quality ingredients, signature toppings, and very good value for money.
reviews: Best Pizza in Pola. True Neapoletan style. High quality ingredients and mouthwatering dough. Soft and crunchy. Definitely something special and worth trying

Nice pizzas, really thin, easy to cut and eat. Prices are alright. I just don't like smoked areas inside. Tasty lemon water 😋 not too busy now in the middle of the week. Interesting interior. Would use to hang some fly catchers. Would go there again to taste different pizzas. I like how they are not heavy on stomach as they can be sometimes. Menue is here on the web which is nice. Recommend 👍
Excellent pizzas and brilliant service. The pizzas were incredibly fresh and tasty. We ate here twice because it was so fantastic.

properties.name: Yacht Restaurant & Lounge Bar
properties.description: A stylish seaside bar and restaurant in a tourist resort in Pula, set by the hotels and the sea, offering local and international dishes, drinks, coffee, and desserts.
reviews: Great place with lovely food and cocktails and a great view. We always managed to secure a table without a reservation and staff were helpful

We enjoyed this restaurant so much that we returned a few nights later to try it again. The views are spectacular. The food was delicious and the staff were friendly and knowledgeable about the food and wine. The only downside was the toilets were a bit grubby.

Lovely little restaurant overlooking the sea and surrounding area in Pula. Firstly the staff and service was excellent! Everyone was so welcoming, our waiter had brilliant recommendations which we went for and the food was so good! The local white wine was so nice too! Desert and coffees were also lovely of course and the view from our table was awesome! We had a really lovely evening which was made better by the staff and the setting. Thank you all!

properties.name: Bar Cuba Libre
reviews: Very hospitable and smiling staff, pleasant tables to sit at under the shade with a view of the marina. We had iced coffee which was very good! One recommendation for the bar: please do not serve plasyic straws :)
Delicious macchiato, comfy chairs, great service and a pretty view! Will definitely come back. My friends ordered the mojito and enjoyed It!
A now local, already “traditional” Pula café. Great coffee, great crew, and a positive vibe. A pleasant view in both summer and winter.

properties.name: Pomodoro
properties.description: A casual restaurant in the heart of Pula’s old town, located on one of the main central streets and serving pizza, pasta, seafood, and desserts in a lively setting.
reviews: Surprisingly best restaurant we visited here. Everyday we tried some different restaurant, everything was good but this one was so good that I decided to write this review :) Waitress was very polite and helpful. Taste of food was just outstanding. This was very good experience wort every penny. We all agreed that we had to come back here. Thank you Pomodoro
Very good pizza and tagliatelle. Waitress was very nice and helpful when we asked questions about some meals. Be careful not to order too much! Size of the meal is rather big.

An absolutely perfect experience at Restaurant Pomodoro in Pula! 🌟 From the moment we sat down, everything was flawless – exceptional service, professional and friendly waiters who made us feel welcome right away. 🍷 The food was simply outstanding! The pizzas were a highlight – Tartufo and Quattro Formaggi were absolutely amazing, with a perfect dough that was light yet crispy in just the right way. The fish was beautifully prepared, fresh and full of flavor, a true Mediterranean delight. The white wines were perfectly chilled and paired wonderfully with the meal. 🐟🍕 Restaurant Pomodoro deserves every recommendation – a must-visit spot for a true gourmet experience in Pula! 👌✨

properties.name: Pizzeria Jupiter
properties.description: A long-standing Italian restaurant in a casual space with a terrace and offering pizzas, pasta and seafood dishes, and other dishes.
reviews: The best pizza that we ever tried in Pula, big portions, and very fast service and very friendly staff. Highly recommend! Our server Sasha was top notch, even recommended us chilli oil for our pizza!! Thank you for your great service!!

Always good and fast service, pleasant atmosphere on the terrace, and delicious food. We had Istarski odrezak, which is a version of turkey cordon bleu, deliciously done in cheese and mushrooms sauce with fries. The first bite was so amazingly tasty my taste buds started singing!

Excellent pizza and pancakes. But I didn't expect pancakes to be so huge, it is almost a meal on its own. I almost died trying to eat it after the pizza 😂 Of course, this is not criticism but compliment because they don't cheap out.

properties.name: McDonald's
properties.description: Classic, long-running fast-food chain located next to a shopping center, known for its burgers and fries
reviews: 🍟 Everyone knows McDonald’s, so I really don’t need to write much about it. The food tastes the same almost everywhere. Even though we came from Germany, it tastes the same here in Croatia (Pula) = fast food. However, in this evening I would like to focus more on the team in this review tonight. I even think it was the shop manager or his deputy (at the McCafe stand) who was so nice and accommodating, it was about a little milk for the kids and we were immediately offered milk in a to-go cup for on the go. Thank you very much, because that doesn't happen often these days!

It is situated right next to a parking lot for buses so ideal for bus to stop - just across. The entrance is disabled people friendly since the restaurant is on flat ground. It has kids section on the terrace that is separated from the road so they are safe. We came with bus full of students, the service was immaculate and fast (off season!)
Just your standard McDonald’s. Service was fast, food was delicious. As an English person I was very pleased to find a sundae which is discontinued in my country.

properties.name: Restoran Neptun
properties.description: A seaside restaurant on Brijuni with a spacious terrace by the water, serving Mediterranean cuisine in an elegant hotel setting.

properties.name: Restoran Carmen
properties.description: A hotel restaurant with views of olive groves and surrounding greenery, offering Mediterranean dining, private celebrations, room service, and year-round catering.

properties.name: Sirena
properties.description: A relaxed café on Pula’s main square, offering coffee, wine, cocktails, and terrace seating with views of the historic Forum.
reviews: Wonderful place for coffee or a glass of delicious wine, with a view of the beautiful buildings around Forum Square. During our visits, we had the pleasure to meet waitress with long, slightly wavy hair — she was sooo cool and perfectly handled all orders. We'd love to come back! ❤️
Nice terrace on the square! During the day, lots of shadow because of the wide parasols! The square is open, don’t get sunburned !
Nice place, amazing coctails and lovely staff!

properties.name: Vela Nera
properties.description: A stylish hotel restaurant in Šišan near Pula, serving Mediterranean and Istrian cuisine, local wines, cocktails, business lunches, and catering in an elegant setting.
reviews: Everything was impressive, we stayed for a couple of days and we had a really good time. In addition the food from the breakfast and the restaurant was delicious with an excellent presentation. Finally, the staff was super friendly and really professional!

This is a gem! A great family run hotel with amazing food. The service is just wonderful with an attitude that makes everything possible. I stayed 8 nights in a very spacious super clean room. I enjoyed the pool and the fabulous food. It was truly a home away from home. For me the location was great, easy drives into the main tourist areas for work while I could enjoy the off the beaten track feel of the calm village. I am hoping to go back for leisure with my family.

Went for food as part of our wedding anniversary celebrations. The service was fantastic, the food was absolutely brilliant. We had beef steak and tuna steak which were both cooked to perfection. The deserts were wonderful, apple strudel and a chocolate souffle. Great evening in a fantastic setting to watch the sun go down over a tasty bottle of wine which was superbly recommended by our waiter.

properties.name: E&D lounge
properties.description: A seasonal bistro and lounge bar on Verudela in Pula, offering Mediterranean dishes, pizza, pasta, seafood, meat dishes, cocktails, and a relaxed terrace with a sea view.
reviews: Really nice place, we had pizza which was really good and reasonably priced. Drinks are a bit spenny compared to the local bars/restaurants, but the staff are so lovely and patient with us as we tried to muddle through with our terrible Croatian. There's even a friendly cat around!

We came in the middle of the day and were offered a surprisingly good selection of food, coffee and ice cream. The view from the terrace is fab as the bar is within walking distance of a beach. There is also a modern art display just in front of it.
I only had a coffee after a walk around the coast, but cappuccino was good and good value. Staff were friendly. The views were beautiful.

properties.name: Galeb
properties.description: A casual bistro and grill restaurant serving grilled meat dishes, ćevapi, steaks, mixed platters, fried and grilled squid, whole fish, and seafood specialties.
reviews: Service courteous, eat very delicious at a relatively low price and the beer is on tap. What more could you want
The service was excellent, always there when you needed something. The food was fresh and extremely delicious, the music was nice, and the overall atmosphere was calm.

I had the seafood pasta and it was absolutely delicious. It was a very light red cream sauce. I don’t know all the different kinds of seafood that was in it, but there was a big variety and it was delicious. I eat here on August 13 and it was quite warm outside, and I sat on the patio which is covered and shaded and has bands and wasfine to sit in. I’ll be a bit warm. Service was OK but just fine. It’s off the beaten path, so it felt not so part of the hustle and bustle with a little more private.

properties.name: Corso
properties.description: A relaxed city-center restaurant specializing in Neapolitan-style pizza, fresh pasta, quality meat dishes, desserts, and Istrian-inspired catering.
reviews: We enjoyed a relaxed delicious meal this evening. No loud music so we could carry on a conversation. Food was excellent and well priced. Service was great. We would recommend for sure.

This spot has a wonderfully simple design right on the main promenade, offering a unique local atmosphere. We absolutely loved the friendly staff and the delicious pizzas. The ice coffee was also a perfect treat! Highly recommend for an authentic experience

Very good restaurant in Pula at famous Giardini, pasta is really good, prices are affordable, always so much fun visit this place! In the heart of Pula, really close to Golden Gate, very calm place full of love :)

properties.name: Rock Caffe
properties.description: A cult rock bar in Pula’s old town, known for live concerts, a laid-back club atmosphere, billiards, and generations of locals who grew up with rock music there.
reviews: Great music and environment! There is local people having having drinks and talking, a very rock style bar! I went there only for a drink and stayed all night bc was very easy and chill place, highly recommended! Great wifi!
I enjoyed the jukebox very much! And I also like that you can have a good cheap Macchiato at 8 AM.

Laid back bar with great live music (not every night but most of the week) and awesome atmosphere! It has cool ambient with many memorabilia! As for selection, they offer wide variety of alcoholic beverages and beers with affordable prices! Pool table is great addition!! :)

properties.name: Tanja 3
properties.description: A classic city-center fast-food spot in Pula, popular for late-night burgers, fries, and quick comfort food.
reviews: Wow. Small local place always have such a nice food. Two ladies inside. Very polite. Food was amazing. And cheep. Lot of people is coming and eating there. Local hit

properties.name: Green
properties.description: A casual fast-food spot in Pula’s city center, known for burgers, toast sandwiches, tortillas, salads, and quick meals.
reviews: Great service. We had a Fried Chicken Wrap which was very delicious and perfectly rolled. Even spread filling from top to bottom. Perfect place for a fast snack to go.
We ordered a falafel and chicken wrap. Both super good quality and value for money. Also the toast were large, can easily share one for 2 kids.

Perfect food whatever you take, for the price and quality is far ahead best place to eat in Pula. Went to few restaurants but Green is far ahead comparing quality, amount you get and prices. Nothing but best for Green.👏🏼

properties.name: Ribarska Koliba
properties.description: A refined seaside restaurant known for fresh local seafood, Mediterranean cuisine, Istrian wines, homemade desserts, and elegant dining with a sea view.
reviews: A culinary highlight! The dishes are creative, refined and simply taste convincing. The service is friendly and attentive, the ambience warm and welcoming – perfect for a relaxed lunch or dinner. A little downer: The plates were cold, so the food quickly became lukewarm. Nevertheless, an all-round recommended visit!
Exceptional food and service ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Best lubina, stuffed swuid was excellent as well! Lovely setting for an evening meal.
Nice view and good food! The only downside was that the main course came pretty soon after the starter. As a result, we were basically ready within an hour. We had to wait the longest for the bill 😅

properties.name: Milan
properties.description: A modern hotel restaurant near the beach, inspired by Istrian and Mediterranean cuisine, with a strong focus on seasonal seafood, an extensive wine selection, and its own olive oil production.
reviews: A superb hotel in a fascinating city, with exquisite rooms, convenient parking, and easy access to walking paths. Breakfast was delicious and served in a lovely restaurant. Staff is friendly and helpful. Highly recommend.
Beautiful restaurant that had great service during the off season.

properties.name: Cafe Frei
properties.description: An international coffee bar located in the Kaufland complex and known for a wide range of world-inspired coffee drinks, teas, smoothies, cakes, and take-away options.
reviews: This has become my regular spot for a morning coffee. The coffee is really good (regular, haven’t tried with alternative milks etc.), and they have some variations too. Oit of those I tried a few and they were also amazing. My kid had hot chocolate and it was delicious. I can only but recommend.

One of the best coffee you can drink in Pula town. The one on the picture is the matcha pistacchio, very delicious. Service and waitress are top of the tops. Very nice looking place, good atmosphere, calm and tidy. You can choose between a variety of coffee, ice cream and desserts. I am very satisfied and can only recommend it. Go for it, 5 stars!
Absolutely amazing service and coffee to die for. I've been coming to Pula for years on end. I'm yet to find better tasting coffee.

properties.name: Gaucho
properties.description: A modern steakhouse in city center, specializing in dry-aged steaks, premium beef cuts, Argentine-inspired dishes, seafood, and an extensive wine list.
reviews: The best steak you can eat at Pula. Portions are generous. Tasty side dishes. Grilled octopus really good cooked. Waiters very helpful and friendly! Recommended!
Great food, great atmosphere, and very kind personnel. I would definitely recommend (especially the parrillada). Definitely best place in Pula.
It was all perfect, excellent wine, very very good meat and delicious dessert. I'm sure I'm going back again.
We went as a group of friends for the All you can eat menu and were not dissapointed. Every dish was better than the one before. Will defintely come back and recommend!

properties.name: 69 Food
properties.description: A city-center street food spot on main street, known for seafood specialties, burgers, grilled chicken, and a modern fast-food concept with a strong local identity.
reviews: Cosy bar, wine measure was very generous with great, fast service same for the food orders. Lovely setting at the start of the old town. Food was very tasty.
Mood, food and value for money absolutely TOP. For a small snack or a delicious burger during the city stroll in Pula stop there again and again.
Very happy with this experience. Nice staff, fresh produce and well worked. Very good beer. If you’re looking to take a little break to eat don’t hesitate!

The food is amazing and so so delicious. I had problems deciding which main to order and ended up having the tuna steak burger which was crazy good. As the portions are quite big, I didn't take something else but was looking at the tables around me and all of their menu items looked just mouthwatering. Their draft beers are also on point. The staff is also extremely polite, fast in service and greets everyone with a bit of jokes and small talk, which i totally liked. Highly recommend this place!

properties.name: Veritas Food & Wine
properties.description: A family-run restaurant in the heart of Pula, known for seafood, steaks, pasta, Istrian wines, and a romantic atmosphere beside historic landmarks.
reviews: We were having an amazing experience. Tonight we try all the productes with truffles. Pasta with truffles, steak with truffles and fish fillet with truffles, they even have beer with truffles!! For start we had 2 Hibiki Japanese whiskeys, and later with the food we shared a bottle of Matosevic Grimalda.
Some of the best fishing scampi I've had. Already had high expectations with the great reviews but this blew me away. Definitely coming back on our next visit.

Walking by I thought this restaurant was super cute and then looking at the menu, my husband and I walked back to go. We are so thankful we did! The food was amazing. The service was impeccable. They paired the drinks perfectly, recommended the freshest and best dishes, and even gave you the option to clean the fish themselves at the table. Very personable and friendly staff who work as a team but gave you the space to enjoy your time. The view and breeze was an added bonus. If I could give more stars, I absolutely would. Adding to my files of recommended eateries to share with family and friends who travel to Pula!

We just had dinner here and it was above and beyond what we were expecting. We had a few dinners in Pula that were just okay but this was amazing. Arian gave excellent service while handling a huge section and a wait. We tried the scallops and local cheese for an appetizer. The scallops were perfectly prepared and the cheese was all local. Now for the main dishes. My better half had the lamb. Completely drool worthy, while I on the other hand had the truffle steak with the hand made pasta. Look no further! This was the best steak I have ever had. If we lived here we would come every week. The biggest issue is now I feel like I need truffles in every thing!

properties.name: Old City
properties.description: A casual restaurant in the center of Pula offering a wide variety of dishes, including seafood, grilled meat, burgers, pasta, pizza, salads, and vegetarian options. It is a good choice for both full meals and drinks, with a menu that combines local Istrian flavors, fish specialties, and classic international dishes.
reviews: Food is excellent 😊 staff are super friendly and the atmosphere is great 🙋‍♀️🌸 and Spezial orders are no problem 😂😂 we tried nearly the whole Menü between all of us and we recommend it all …… we still say all the above …. But hier too the prices have exploded since the Euro !!!!!
Awesome place for lunch. The food was delicious, the staff was really great, the location is excellent. If you're in Pula, please visit Old City Bar - you won't be disappointed.

properties.name: Restaurant & Bar Gardelin
properties.description: A long-running family restaurant and guesthouse on Veli Vrh, known for regional cuisine, charcoal-grilled meat and fish, homemade pasta, a spacious terrace, and weekend live music.
reviews: Highly recommended. If you want to eat well, inexpensively and in a nice atmosphere, you should definitely visit this pub. The prices are more than fair, the place is a very nice looking place and the menu selection is great. The food tastes great and the waiters are just as friendly. The pork on bbq is just amazing!

Bloody gorgeous place!! We saw this place on the way to Rovinj and it looked great. Read the reviews and thought oh maybe not so good BUT forget the negative reviews- this place is great, lovely food, time is on your side and it beats all the places on pula central who pretty much sell the same menu. You also feel like you are having a local experience - try it and love it!!!
It was our first food stop while visiting Pula. The fish is perfectly cooked, and the potatoes with chard is very good. The fries were cooked well.

properties.name: Padela
properties.description: A stylish waterfront restaurant on Pula’s Riva, specializing in handmade pasta, risotto, seafood, wine, and seasonal local ingredients.
reviews: Excellent experience dining at this unique and wonderful restaurant! Beautifully decorated and very kind, professional service. We immediately felt welcomed. The waiter was also very helpful with describing the different dishes and house made pastas. Highly recommended.

Fine dining with local touch and amazing ingredients. We were super amazed about the quality and taste of food. The pasta is perfectly cooked with carefully combined flavors and sauce. Thanks to the chef and team for the experience! 👏

Padela is wonderful small restaurant with such a sweet atmosphere. Our server was so lovely and gave us exceptional wine recommendations. The pasta is to die for and the seafood is clearly very fresh. Highly recommend adding this place to your time in Pula!

properties.name: Bounty
properties.description: A cozy Irish-style pub in city center, known for draft beer, a wide drink selection, and a comfortable terrace with a relaxed atmosphere.
reviews: An excellent Irish pub with a great Irish atmosphere. Clean, tidy, good to be here As it is a bit away from the busy tourist area, it is not crowded. Guinness and local beers on tap, plus a great selection of drinks. Shaded, comfortable terrace.

Didn't get to stay here for long (one drink) however it has a real homely feel to the place and is a really nicely situated pub. Good atmosphere and seating options, good drink choices which are more foreign options (Guinness/Heineken/Jack Daniels etc) and the prices are quite good also! Would recommend stopping in for some drinks if in the local area!
This is a proper bar. Beautiful inside. A nice seating area outside. They have a really good selection of drinks on offer.

properties.name: Cinderela
properties.description: A long-running café known for quality coffee, drinks, music, and a lively yet relaxed atmosphere, with regular events and a comfortable terrace.
reviews: We had coffee, it was delicious. Food bought from the bakery across the street can be eaten in the café.
Good tasting espresso, and they also have things like oat-milk for a cappuccino if you can't handle the cow milk.
Great for a coffee break or getting with friends. My car service is nearby so I usually wait there to pick up my car.

properties.name: Milan 1967
properties.description: A popular café by the city market, known as a longtime local meeting spot for coffee, juices, desserts, and light snacks.
reviews: For my taste best coffee in pula and the lemonade fab, staff are friendly and the best thing they are now open till 6pm during the week so after the beach I can get another coffee. Thank You 😊 …
A great place to sit and watch people pass by. Very friendly waitresses. Selection of snacks and cakes. Fountain nearby where kids can play without danger.
Nice coffee, desserts and service, a bit expensive though. Atmosphere could be more cosy (for my taste)

properties.name: Kantina
properties.description: Classic Mediterranean eatery with stone walls & a terrace serving seafood, meat dishes & wine.
reviews: Excellent food, friendly and prompt staff. Highly recommand. It is also 8 minutes walk from The Arena and 5 minutes from the beautiful center.

Impeccable Service (they speak Italian), the place is quiet and out of the confusion, we were offered an appetizer with cheese and truffles which was delicious, then we had salmon and white fish and they were really exceptional. Great value for money. We arrived on foot walking through the center but if you want there is also a convenient parking. Highly recommended!

Kantina Restaurant was a very beautiful surprise! We found the restaurant based on other very good reviews and we were more than satisfied. The restaurant is located a few hundred meters from Paula's center, and is very easy to reach. We had a full meal based on truffle dishes that were delicious. The waiter was extremely professional and kind and, in addition to our order, we have received a starter and a small amaro at the end of the dinner. Highly recommend!

Dining at Restaurant Kantina in Pula was an absolute delight from start to finish. The whole fish I ordered was nothing short of spectacular—fresh, perfectly cooked, and bursting with authentic Mediterranean flavors that truly showcased the quality of local seafood. What made the experience even more memorable was the impeccable service. The staff delivered a level of fine dining hospitality that felt both professional and warmly personal.

properties.name: Peking
properties.description: A long-running Chinese restaurant, offering a broad menu of classic Chinese dishes including noodles, rice, duck, beef, pork, chicken, seafood, soups, and fried starters, with dine-in and takeout options.
reviews: Staying in Pula for a few days and the restaurant is very close by, I read the reviews which are certainly mixed but thought we would give it a try. It seems that there is one guy cooking and one lady serving so we had to wait a long time for drinks and food but the food when it arrived was lovely, one of the best Chinese meals we’ve ever had. Give the place a try but expect a wait for your food! Just have a beer whilst waiting 😉

Very good food. Good Chinese with lots of choice. Would recommend it to anyone. Nice service. The outside terrace is a bit dated and noisy due to the amount of cars that drive past so it is recommended to eat inside and it looks nice there.
Ordered a takeaway away to be delivered. Came within 30 minutes. Nice food and very good value for money with big portions.

properties.name: MORE fish-food
properties.description: A casual seafood-focused restaurant, serving homemade and Mediterranean dishes with an emphasis on seafood, fish, shellfish, pasta, and daily local specialties.
reviews: Very spartan environment compensated by the quality of the products served. There is no menu: the fish is chosen directly from the fridge counter and is always fresh. Istrian Malvasia of the house very good. Definitely not cheap, but the quality of the dishes deserves the price. In short, a real seafood restaurant where fish is the real and only protagonist, without frills or platitudes. For us it is now a must at every step of our journey to Pula.

We were in Fish food More at least 7 times during last 3 weeks. The reason of coming back was an incredible service Sandra has provided together with an outstanding seafood pasta. Well done! Worth every penny.

Probably the best local restaurant you’ll find in Pula. They serve only the freshest fish and seafood, offering a truly local experience. The staff is wonderfully authentic – knowledgeable, passionate, and genuinely caring. The location itself has remained just as it was decades before the restaurant opened, which gives it a unique and timeless charm. You simply share what you feel like eating, and they will prepare it in a way that creates a meal to remember for a lifetime. I warmly recommend this place to anyone visiting Pula – it’s the essence of a true Mediterranean and Istrian experience.

properties.name: Da Bruno
properties.description: A casual restaurant and pizzeria in autocamp area, offering grilled meat dishes, pizzas, risottos, pasta, seafood, desserts, and drinks in a spacious setting suited to families and holiday dining.
reviews: We were on a family vacation and we came 3 times becouse the food and service is the best!!😋 The price is very good and affordable! They have free wifi! The service is really fast and it’s pet friendly! We ate steak and mussels! The mussels is the best here in Medulin!!😋😋 We loved this place and I hope that I will come back sometimes! They have music too and it’s not that loud!😃😃

If you don't like too much people around you this is probably one of the best places in Medulin. I had some kind on stakes here and Diavilo pizza with mushrooms and they were great. The waiters were very friendly. I just couldn't complain about anything.The price is also good. They do give very good exchange for the money.
Very nice place, good food and nice waiters😊Delicious pizza and pancakes

properties.name: Bistro Oliva
properties.description: A modern restaurant in the Verudela resort complex, set next to the pools and offering a varied menu of Istrian dishes, seafood, grilled meat, pizza, salads, pasta, burgers, and desserts in a relaxed holiday setting.
reviews: This place is lovely. It’s sunny and right by the shore, with a beautiful sea view from inside. The service is friendly and fast - no long waiting times for food, which is a big plus. The Croatian dishes are delicious, the cocktails are great, and the prices are very reasonable. A perfect spot to relax, enjoy good food, and take in the view. Highly recommend!

The location is just wonderful with great views and a feeling of space. We have eaten here now 3 times and each time the service has been good and the food excellent. The range of options available mean you should find something to your liking. Definitely recommended

Oh my gosh never ever have I gotten the service this place offered me! Especially for a pool lounge! I asked if I could get some plastic cups for my water so I could drink it at the pool and they bring me the cups with ice 🧊 . It’s a kindness and this place is full of these little gestures! Amazing staff on a beautiful spot! Every visit was 5 stars!! Good cocktails ! Good food good icecream and a customer service focused on delivering the extra holiday feel!! I am a fan!

properties.name: Caffe Bar San Antonio
properties.description: A casual café bar set directly above the Pula Arena, known for its terrace with a unique view of the amphitheatre. It serves coffee, beer, soft drinks, ice cream, and other classic café-bar refreshments in a relaxed open-air setting.
reviews: Aperol Spritz are the best in Pula! Ice cream are just melting in mouth. The view is amazing
Best view, good coffee
Good coffee. Waitress semi friendly

properties.name: Dva ferala
properties.description: A casual restaurant in city center, located on the main street near the cathedral, serving grilled dishes, seafood, meat plates, and other Mediterranean-style local favorites in a relaxed setting with a terrace.
reviews: We had a double fish platter . It did not disappoint. The selection was incredible. We would like to draw particular attention to the tuna. As well traveled as we are , nothing tasted like it . Incredible! My husband got a standing aviation for filleting the fish. Wine came in a tumbler , which complimented the fish beautifully. Thank you! We felt very welcome
We went to eat there twice during the holidays, once truffle noodles and Plescavica. Both were excellent. Good draft beer, what more could you want:)
The fish platter was excellent! Very fresh and delicious! The service was great! The drinks were good too!Highly recommended!

properties.name: Biberon Fine Food
properties.description: A self-service restaurant in the Konzum shopping center, offering ready-made daily meals with quick service and convenient parking.
reviews: Self-service canteen with already made food. No waiting, parking available. The portions are not large and prices are not that cheap.
Food is good, prices are fair, except for the drinks, service is just fine, soup should be with more ingredients and denser. But comparing to other places, excelent

properties.name: Mini Mini Street Food
properties.description: A small street food restaurant in Pula serving freshly prepared daily lunches, colorful healthy plates, homemade pasta, dumplings, salads, desserts, and other casual dishes made with local and organic ingredients.
reviews: So lovely tiny cosy place! Delicious, homemade food! Service excellent! Perfect chick &vegan options! 🤩⭐️
Excellent food and ambient. Lots of vegetarian options, big size dishes, good price for the given quantity and quality.

properties.name: Restaurant Karlo
properties.description: A contemporary seafood-focused restaurant offering fish and shellfish platters, grilled octopus, scampi, tuna, sea bass, seafood pasta and risotto, along with selected meat dishes, wines, and cocktails in an elegant setting with terrace seating.
reviews: The food was very delicious and the portions were generous. You can tell they use fresh and high-quality ingredients. I can only recommend it. This is already our second time coming back here because it's so good.
Really cute and quiet place! The food was good, fresh, service is very good
It was a pleasure taste. Staff was nice and helpfull. Dishes were delicious. Fish plate for 2 was great and very tastefull. We eat also ravioli and burger. It was delicious.

properties.name: Cabahia
properties.description: A long-standing Veruda café recently refreshed into a snack bar, known for quality coffee, a wide beer selection, brunch dishes, burgers, bao buns, tortillas, desserts, and a relaxed local atmosphere.
reviews: Great food, atmosphere, staff, and prices. I paid €12.80 for two bao buns, sweet potato fries, and a small macchiato. The other day I ordered a veggie tortilla and a hot dog with guacamole sauce via Wolt—each one better than the other. My sincere recommendation for this place!

Currently the best snack bar in Pula, especially considering they offer a wide range of breakfast/brunch options that lean on the healthier side. The prices are also affordable and justified. The tortilla is large and excellent, the English muffin is my top choice, and the croque madame is also great. Any reviews below 4–5 stars aren’t accurate and can easily be ignored, because every time I’ve been here, it’s been even better than the previous visit.
Excellent food, great service—an exceptionally kind and professional waiter. A warm and nicely decorated space, which is unfortunately unnecessarily crowded with tables.

properties.name: Big Mama Beachbar
reviews: Fantastic beach bar with a relaxed atmosphere and stunning sea views. The drinks are refreshing, the staff is friendly, and the music creates the perfect summer vibe. A great place to unwind and enjoy the sunset!
The food is delicious and the staff is excellent! A beautiful place for a beach holiday. Beautiful sunset.

We passed this bar on a walk along the coast. On the terrace you can sit very nicely and watch the wakeboarders who are active on the wakeboard system. We had Coke and non-alcoholic beer, each from a local vendor and well chilled. Cheeseburgers and classic burgers were well fried and delicious. The fries were great and the fried calamari crispy. Everything was served on a beautiful wooden board plastic-free. The young man who served us was very nice and spoke a very good English.

properties.name: Kukuriku
properties.description: A relaxed city-center café, offering coffee, cocktails and casual sweet and savory snacks in a pleasant outdoor setting.
reviews: Nice place, friendly waiter and really tasty food
Loved this place! It has really good chocolate croissants and the cappuccino is also very good.
Nice place in city center. A bit pricey. Aperol spritz 8eur, Hugo the same. Staff was nice and professional.

properties.name: Vodnjanka - Trattoria
properties.description: A long-standing trattoria known for authentic Istrian cuisine, daily fresh ingredients, local seafood and meat dishes, and a warm atmosphere filled with traditional character and local heritage.
reviews: Great welcome in a very nice place. The best Kvarner scampi of my life. Excellent creamed cod.

The exterior look is not great, unlike the cozy interior where it is good to live. The food is excellent and the staff very kind and good advice. It is the restaurant that we like without bling bling but with local cuisine and quality.The desserts are excellent as is the stew of “Bordet” local specialty

We ate marinated mixed fish as a starter! What a wonderful dish, such fresh fish, really refreshing. We then had scampi spaghetti and grilled bream (I think). The potato salad was to die for. Simple, fresh food, really well cooked . We would definitely recommend it.

properties.name: Stoja Fast Food
properties.description: A casual fast-food spot near the beach in Stoja, offering burgers, sandwiches, coffee, soft drinks, ice cream, with covered outdoor seating and sea views.
reviews: Great little fast food restaurant, with very fair prices and decent choice of food, drink and ice-cream. Parking nearby (free). Had food went for a swim and returned for ice-cream and cold drink

Best Ice cream in Pula and around. Coffee is out of this world good. Food is great as well. Very pleasent place and staff is very kind, especially young blond server. We are very frequent guests and our friends are very pleased as well.
Amazing food, waiters came quickly the ice cream is very good, yiu cab pay by cash or card

properties.name: Admiral
properties.description: A casual seafood-focused restaurant, serving fresh Adriatic fish, calamari, mussels, shrimp, pasta, and mixed platters, with friendly service and generous portions.
reviews: A great welcome from the staff. Great atmosphere, very relaxed and the staff attentive. Our food was delicious. I had stuffed calamari which was tender and very tasty. My partner had sea bass cooked perfectly. Shame we didn’t have room for dessert!

Very well, I haven't written reviews in years , here is fascinated by the professional approach to each guest and serving sea dishes as art 🐟🧘🏽‍’”beautiful dishes and portions worthy of giants 😂thank you and low bow chefs 💜🙏🏽

Very nice restaurant in the neighborhood we stayed in. Good tastes, hearty portions, great Service and very nice staff. We ate here three times during our week. Pasta frutti di mare, risotto frutti di mare, fish plateter and mixed grill were the dishes we ate. You have to try fish flatter, sooooo good flavors and lots of food! Very affordable we thought.

Great! The food is super good, and the hosts are the best! In my opinion its the best restaurant in Pula. We went here a few times and everytime we went here we went home with a satisfied feeling! Would definetly recommend!

properties.name: Farabuto
properties.description: A small boutique-style slow food restaurant focused on seasonal ingredients, homemade pasta and bread, and honest Istrian and Mediterranean cuisine in a quiet, intimate setting.
reviews: We went by indication of the staff of the hotel located right near the restaurant Farabuto. This restaurant is a hidden jewel in Pula. Serves a tasty meal with fresh ingredients. We ordered Vieira with mushrooms and ravioli with mushrooms, simply magnificent. The prices are excellent and the service was impeccable.

Everything was amazing! This restaurant was recommended by our airbnb host :) Just when we sat down we were already served fresh homemade bread. For drinks we’ve had the open house wine which was really good. We’ve had the fish soup as a starter which was great. As the main course we’ve shared the mixed mussels and the baked fish covered with pine nuts and almonds which was really really good. As a desert we’ve shared a lemon cheese cake which was - again - amazing. Staff was friendly and the location is nice and quiet. The wait for the food was a bit longer than we were used to in Croatia, which we didn’t mind since it was a good sign that everything was freshly made. Would definitely recommend eating here :)

We did not expect this, what a wonderful surprise! We were lucky to have a table without reservation-it was in the quiet residential area and casual restaurant but the seafood was fresh and amazing! We especially enjoyed grilled prawn and octopus salad-Highly recommend!!!

properties.name: Caffe Bar Uliks
properties.description: A historic café bar in the very center of Pula, right next to the Arch of the Sergii, known for its literary connection to James Joyce, a wide drinks selection, specialty local spirits and craft beers, and a lively atmosphere with quizzes and other events.
reviews: Would highly recommend! Really nice people inside and great vibes. The decor is so cool!
Really lovely small pub, 10/10 would recommend for a quick pint. Cool statue of James Joyce outside who used to teach English in the building back yonder.
Best place to watch Pula‘s life, friendly service, reasonable prices, my recommendation: the Negroni
A nice cup of coffee on a beautiful spot next to the Arch of the Sergii.

properties.name: Cookie
properties.description: A modern café bar in Max City on Stoja with a spacious terrace, sea views, and a casual setting for coffee, desserts, and light meals.

properties.name: Caffe Bar AS
properties.description: A local neighborhood bar just above the Arena area in central Pula, known for a casual atmosphere, coffee, beer, and everyday drinks in a simple, social setting.
reviews: A simple small one room locals bar not far from the rear of the arena. A lot nicer inside than the exterior would have you believe. Very reasonable prices. Paulicarus asked for a small Ožujsko. 2.3€ for a 0.33l bottle. Nice and cold. The 0.5l is only 30 cents more but need to drink fast to enjoy it cold. A pleasant bar for a quick beer.
A great local bar in the back streets of Pula. I like it here away from the tourist areas 👍
Beautiful bar, where I met new friends and the drinks are cheap. I love it!

properties.name: Kod Kadre
properties.description: A casual local grill restaurant known for traditional Balkan-style grilled meat dishes, hearty portions, and a relaxed, no-frills atmosphere.
reviews: Very delicious food. Affordable. Calm atmosphere. The Cevapcici were delicious. The fries portion big. The bread was also very delicious

Kod Kadre is a great place to spend a pleasant evening with friends. The venue is clean and welcoming, with an ideal temperature and no smells coming from the kitchen. The cuisine is simple and authentic, with tasty traditional dishes served with a cheerful touch. The staff are friendly, polite, and always attentive to customers’ needs. Prices are very reasonable. I would recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing evening with good food at affordable prices.

We came in to get some good Croatian food, we got the cevapi and some gnocchi gulash, and everything was delish. On top of that the waitress was the cutest nicest ever ! I'd definitely comeback there !

We had lunch here today. The waitress was very kind and helpful, the menu offers a wide selection, and the food was truly delicious. The desserts are spectacular. The wait for the main courses was really short. Highly recommended.

properties.name: Fast Food Station 0 - Dva asa
properties.description: A casual fast-food spot at the main bus station in Pula, serving burgers, ćevapi, kebabs, tortillas, toast sandwiches, fries, and quick drinks for an easy meal on the go.
reviews: Very friendly and helpful service, and large portions at a very good price. The food was delicious; a great recommendation for quick travel food! Unfortunately, there were no vegetarian options besides fries and salad.
Amazing food for super cheap. Fries were incredible, chicken wrap was really good. Chef was super nice and hard working. Great experience overall would highly recommend for cheap travel food :)

properties.name: Caffe Bar Nozi 7
properties.description: A casual café at Pula’s bus station, suitable for a quick coffee, soft drink, beer, or short stop while waiting for transport.
reviews: This coffee is very close to the bus station. It's clean. The service is quick. The prices are very good 👍 It is a very good place to take a coffee when waiting for your bus :)

Took the shuttle bus from Pula airport to Pula bus station. 30 kuna (£3.30) each. 15 mins. Hour to kill before bus to heaven ( Rovinj) so popped into this lovely cafe with attached bakery opposite. First beer of the holiday. Great place to wait. Also toilet in bus station has a pay turnstile unlike here. Tabke service for drinks; go to bakery for food. Excellent value. 88Kuna / £10 for 2 coffee and 4*0.33l beers.

properties.name: French Style Cafe
properties.description: A very local, no-frills café bar at Pula’s bus station, known more as a neighborhood bar for coffee, beer, and spirits than as a modern lounge spot.
reviews: This isn’t your polished, tourist-friendly café-pub — it’s the kind of place where you come for the chat, have a proper laugh, and end up drinking local travarica like it’s medicine for the soul. No frills, no filters — just good people, strong pours, and the kind of banter that makes you forget about your phone. Come with curiosity, don’t be soft and come with a sense of humour, and you’ll leave with a story and maybe a slight buzz. It’s rough around the edges in all the right ways — exactly how it should be. By an Australian

Very aggressive man running the place, has an attitude against tourists. Was intimidating from the start, spoke very aggressively despite the fact we just wanted to have a drink. Asked for tap water as it was almost 40 degrees, he said no (he'd just given iced tap water to all the other patrons who seemed to be locals). Worst I've been treated anywhere

properties.name: Cvajner
properties.description: Art café and gallery on Pula’s main square, known for its striking historic interior, artistic atmosphere, and terrace overlooking the Forum and the Temple of Augustus.
reviews: Great place to get some coffee and quick food; located right in Forum Square, so finding this place is super simple. Service could be a bit better and more organized, but otherwise everything was super tasty.
Very nice iced coffee. Cozy enviroment, interesting design with restored paintings on the walls.

This is in a great location if you sit outside. The Forum has a great buzz and is beautiful. Prices are quite reasonable for such a location (big draught beer €4.2) Most of the staff are busy and seem a bit a bit grumpy ( except one nice waitress) There are small menus on the tables and bills are clearly itemised. We saw a family leave after waiting ages to be served. Inside looks nice too with some old frescos. Locals here too. Worth a visit though.

Gorgeous and cosy caffe... Well preserved historical charm done by keeping the original tapestry and blending it in with the new one. Drinks are well made and the staff is polite, very nice place to come to on a rainy day.

properties.name: Diana
properties.description: Café on Pula’s Forum square with a large terrace, classic coffee-and-drinks offer, and a prime spot for sitting right in the heart of the old town.
reviews: Nice café in the center of Pula. Basic coffee options but good quality and reasonably priced. Pleasant spot for a quick break.
Nice little café with reasonable prices. Their ice coffee tastes nice.
I highly recommend this bar, service was extremly fast and our waitress was very kind. Great location and great drinks. I’ll definitely return.

properties.name: Nonno
properties.description: Restaurant on Forum square with a large terrace and a broad menu of grill dishes, seafood, pasta, risotto, salads, and local-style specialties in a very central old-town location.
reviews: Very cozy place with a family atmosphere. Very accommodating hosts, long time not had such a good waiter. The Service is very attentive and for drinks and food we did not have to wait long. The food portions are generous and definitely worth the price especially the Cevapcici with 14 € was a great portion and very delicious. Also recommended are the fresh gnocchi with a truffle, cream sauce (18€). All in all a great restaurant and would definitely come back. The only thing that was not ideal are the toilets.

When we arrived, there was almost no one there, so the service was fast. But pleasant. The beer was cold, food tasty. During the hot day we liked the mist of water from the umbrellas. And at the end they brought us a free drink.

The service and food were excellent! Above expectations! Exactly the dinner we needed after a 12h drive. The host offered us local wine and rakija from herbs.. amazing! And the truffles.. you really have to come and taste to feel the full experience. :)

The worst octopus salad I had. Very dissapointed. Food is made cheaply. Octopus was chewy, not fresh, same with vegetables in it, like you prepared it long time ago and was stored in a fridge. Restaurant is in nice place, but please go somewhere else 😑

properties.name: Orfej
properties.description: Restaurant in the main street of Pula’s old town with a spacious covered terrace and a broad menu of pizzas, grilled dishes, seafood, salads, pasta, and classic local favorites. A casual spot for a relaxed meal in the historic center.
reviews: Nice Mood, very friendly Service. Pizza and pasta were excellent. Highly recommended! Very good value for money.
We shared a pizza and caprese salad; both excellent. Relaxed, al fresco dining; indoor seating also available. Attentive service provided by the staff.

Absolutely amazing restaurant! The atmosphere is warm and inviting, and we were welcomed by the kindest lady who gave us fantastic recommendations for local dishes to try. Everything we ordered was delicious: from the pizza to the local specialties like the squid. The quality of the food was outstanding, especially considering how affordable the prices are. We even came back twice! A true gem!

Very nice place with very decent prices. 8 euros for a pizza, 12 euros for fried calamari. Big portion difference between the fried and grilled calamari, fried is bigger and more tasty in my opinion. Probably the most cheaps, fair quality price place in the city center.

properties.name: The Shipyard Pub
properties.description: Lively pub on the Riva with burgers, pub food, cocktails, beer, and a spacious terrace. A popular evening spot known for music, DJ sets, quiz nights, and other events in a casual, social atmosphere.
reviews: We stayed here once for a drink and once for dinner. The Service was fast, friendly and accommodating in both cases. The Aperol Spritz was just as delicious as the burgers. These were juicy with very tasty sauces and the caramelized onions rounded it off with a great taste. The fries were also well seasoned and perfectly crispy. The dressing of the ceasar salad was a bit unusual and not quite typical but also incredibly delicious, we would love to come back. Value for money was also reasonable, so what more could you want.
Friendly and efficient staff with delicious food. The burger was very good and my wife really enjoyed the noodles. Worth a stop. Plenty of seating inside and the vibes were relaxing.

Great little bar in the heart of Pula! The atmosphere is warm and relaxed, and the staff were incredibly friendly. The music was just right for chatting without shouting, and prices were very reasonable compared to other spots in town. Perfect place to stop for a drink after sightseeing. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a cozy and authentic bar experience in Pula

properties.name: Riva Restaurant & Lounge Bar
properties.description: Stylish restaurant and lounge bar on the Pula waterfront, blending modern presentation with Mediterranean and local flavors. A good choice for breakfast, brunch, cocktails, and relaxed dinners in an elegant setting.
reviews: Very nice place! I came here for breakfast and really enjoyed it. Delicious food, fantastic atmosphere, and high-quality service. Everything was fresh and tasty, and the staff was very friendly and attentive. Highly recommended!

We were having breakfast and found Riva attractive from the menu tab and location. The service was quick, friendly and correct. The food tasted really good and the extra things we ordered came pretty quickly. Although the staff was busy, we were always greeted with a smile.

A very pleasant ambient with an extremely professional and approachable waiter. For starter, we tried the cold fish appetizer which met all our expectations and for the main course, we tried the tuna steak and the white fish fillet which were good. If you need a wine recommendation, don't hesitate to ask waiter for advice.

properties.name: Imperium Bistro
properties.description: Elegant bistro on Forum square that combines long-standing local tradition with a more modern kitchen, offering refined Mediterranean and seasonal dishes in the heart of Pula.
reviews: With a new manager and chef at the helm, this restaurant is on a trajectory towards success in 2024 and beyond. Their innovative approach to food and hospitality, coupled with a commitment to excellence in every aspect of their operation, sets them apart as a standout destination for food lovers and connoisseurs alike. 💪💪🍻❤️

Nice restaurant with very romantic atmosphere. The location is amazing. Had seafood plate and loved all the seafood options, but the potatoes tasted weird, for which I am giving a bit less. But the local Istrian delicacies were very tasty! Prosciutto was also amazing.

This restaurant is superb. You cannot fault it. Service and food were all so good. Our dishes were excellent and the food that was brought to the tables around us looked amazing too. We had traditional Istrian cuisine. I could’ve stayed there all day. This place is a must visit if you’re visiting Pula. Thanks again.

Really good food, served in a nice manner. The location is also nice, in the old town of Pula. The restaurant is officially closing at 22 hrs, but if you are already at the table, you can continue to enjoy your food without stress (pics made at 22:45 hrs :) ). Thank you for an exquisite evening!

properties.name: Fresh sandwiches & salads
properties.description: Casual street food spot focused on fresh, quick, and healthier meals, with a strong choice of salads, wraps, panini, smoothies, and breakfast items. Especially good for vegetarian and vegan options, but there are meat choices too.
reviews: Food was really nice, we had a wrap filled with hummus and falafel which was really nice to eat on the go while exploring Pula. Would recommend if you like vegetarian food and look for fastfood but in a healthy way. I think they also have meaty options. Price was 7€ for a wrap which was really okay!
Amazing food. So healthy and refreshing! Super reasonable prices and fantastic service. I got the lentil wrap and LOVED IT! Great vegetarian and vegan options.

Had two excellent tortillas and a smoothie. Have to say that the one large tortilla was filling enough for one person, so don't worry you won't have enough. For very little money, you get fresh and healthy food. Fastfood gone good 😊

properties.name: Konoba Taj
properties.description: Traditional Istrian tavern with a warm, home-style atmosphere, a large central fireplace, and a focus on authentic homemade cuisine.
reviews: We had dinner 2 consecutive nights in this trattoria and we always enjoyed both eating fish and meat. Not very large, intimate and frequented by locals, certainly not the classic restaurant for tourists that you can find downtown or on the coast. Very warm service, slow reading but we talk about a family-run structure. Prices in the norm I would say correct

Two thumbs up 👍🏽👍🏽 I got the traditional donkey 🫏 meat dish with pan fried mixed vegetables recommended by Luca. It did not disappoint. It was rich in taste, very flavorful and the meat was tender. Other dish was the homemade pasta with truffles. This dish is always good wherever you go. The savory taste from the truffles is unmatched. Our server Luca was very friendly and got a chance to connect to him. Glad we went there. Hvala Luca.
Absolutely amazing place to have lunch or dinner. Food was delicious, and the place was decorated in the Christmas spirit, which only added to the whole vibe of the place. I recommend.

Based on the reviews of other visitors, we also visited this restaurant. It exceeded our expectations. Beautiful surroundings, lovely staff and excellent food. I have to highlight the beef which was excellent. We will be in Pula for another week, so we will definitely be happy to come back. When I'm not driving, I like to have a glass of schnapps. Greetings, customers from the Czech Republic.

properties.name: Grill bar & Steak House Campo
properties.description: Modern grill and steakhouse known for premium steaks, generous mixed grill platters, ćevapi, burgers, and a wide range of meat specialties in a relaxed, contemporary setting.
reviews: It was delicius. The food was a bomb. It was so freakin good. The staff was awesom and the service was very nice and he did put infos in to the steak. He really explained the different Steaks very very well. The menu was so various. You had the decision of the night. It really did deserve the five stars. Thanks for the great evening guys. The atmossphere was astronomical. Really qiuet. But still you could talk really nicely. It was the best experience of the many. Love the Restaurant. Worth the drive. It had so much drinks and food.

We loved the place and service by Ivan. Had a selection of steaks with some fantastic sauces and little potatos with feta cheese. Kids had lovely grilled chicken. Ribs were also just sensational! The chef made it perfectly medium rare. Would definitely come back!
An Istrian Jewel. Great food, great service, free schnapps. Highly recommended. Fantastic menu selection and reasonably priced. Visited for evening dinner and a lunch.

We had the grill plate for two. The size was really enough and there was a large selection of meat. Everything tasted very good, including the flatbread. The service was very nice. The wait was a little longer because it was busy, but it was still ok. We'd love to go again.

properties.name: Scala
properties.description: A simple café bar right next to the Pula Arena, best known for its unique terrace with a direct view of the amphitheatre. It is a relaxed spot for coffee or a drink in one of the city’s most iconic locations.
reviews: Perfect place to watch the Arena and enjoy a cold drink! Personnel is nice and friendly. Prices are regular. Have you never visited Croatia before? Try Pasareta, a real Croatian drink! 💪🏼 with lots of ice cubes, perfect! We only had drinks, no food. They have a lot of ice creams!
Great coffee bar / drinks. Best spot in the area for a quiet coffee and to enjoy the arena. The staff all spoke many languages and were very helpful on giving local recommendations.
Service extremely friendly and attentive. Nice ambience (with music from the amphitheater). Just perfect, where you feel comfortable and enjoy the sunset. Can only recommend👌

properties.name: Bistro Valkane
properties.description: A modern restaurant on the Lungomare promenade, next to the tennis courts, serving Croatian and Istrian cuisine with terrace seating.
reviews: We had some of the best food in Croatia at this restaurant, it was amazing. We had tuna steak and calamari which were both amazing!! The service was sensational as well, the waitress even offered her jacket to me as the breeze was a bit cool. I could recommend this restaurant highly enough based on our experience.

One of the best places to eat! The food is fresh and absolutely fantastic, the atmosphere is wonderful,good price and Marijana is truly the best waitress in all of Europe. Thank you for everything! See you next year❤️

Lovely restaurant, one of the few in the area with waterfront location. Popular with locals and tourist, great food at reasonable prices. Black rice seafood risotto, and meat plate (mixed grill) were really nice.

properties.name: Restaurant STARI GRAD 02
properties.description: A traditional restaurant in Pula with over 60 years of history, known for homemade Istrian and Mediterranean cuisine, especially fish and seafood dishes.
reviews: The restaurant was recommended by the owner of the apartment we rented during a holiday in Pula. Excellent restaurant, the best in Pula, typical cuisine with homemade pasta and desserts, great prices. Friendly staff. During our 5-day stay we went there 3 times. Highly recommended.
A restaurant that is always good, the food is delicious, the portions are solid, and the price is acceptable for the quality you get.

Food was great - we’ve had scallops as a starter and then shared the tris di calamari which was delicious. However the service was mediocre. Waiter did not really pay attention and was very often uncommunicative and seemingly unwelcoming. Wait time was long, even for getting the receipt and getting change we’ve had to wait some time. We had to pay 3€ for bread that we didn’t order, which was brought at the start (which we thought was complementary, like it usually is).

My favorite daily go to restaurant. It isn’t a fancy place, but it’s great, I lunch there 2-3-4 times a week here the food is always fresh and made in tasty homemade way, from simple pasta, fish and meat dishes to more elaborate things. You can eat a bit of anything here but everything is super tasty. Friendly waiters that take good care of you and the prices are just so fair and your seriously get a lot for your money. It’s a no brainer when in Pula.

properties.name: Leggiero
properties.description: A modern coffee bar and snack spot in Pula City Mall, offering quality coffee, fresh juices, sandwiches, cakes and sweet treats, ideal for a relaxed coffee break while shopping.
reviews: Very expensive place to drink a coffe! Really too much! A price of a coffee in a supermarket must be more cheaper than one in the centre of the city…excessively!!!

A very relaxing place whether you sit inside or outside on the terrace, with an excellent selection of food and drinks and outstanding, dedicated staff—especially the waiter Dylan, who is very fast, helpful, friendly, and fully committed to guests at all times, regardless of the crowd and high turnover of people!

The coffee is average, but definitely not worth €2.90. I’ve had much better coffee for less money. Judging by other reviews, I’m clearly not the only one who thinks the quality doesn’t justify the price.

Always smiling, helpful, and quick, even when dealing with guests who can be very rude and impatient. Kudos to them for their patience—they truly make an effort and give their best to do the job as well as possible. Highly recommended!

properties.name: Leggiero
properties.description: A popular coffee spot in Max City on Stoja, perfect for a coffee break or relaxing after shopping, with Leggiero sandwiches, Torterie Macaron desserts, a spacious terrace, and both smoking and non-smoking areas.
reviews: Since my last visit to this place, I’ve noticed a more positive atmosphere, a friendlier approach, and more efficient service, which wasn’t the case in previous months. You can see the effort and the desire for improvement, and I hope they will continue at this pace and keep the quality staff who create the best impression.

I really enjoyed coffe here. Don't know what people are talking about. The stuff isn't annoying with questions but always there if you need them. You should definitely try their macarons. But there MUST be more people on the shift. Two people (one mixing, one serving) cannot cope with two terraces and a place inside. But this is a question for the owners, not the employees..

Besides the fact that the quality has declined over the past few years, from now on you’ll get a slice of cake for €4.10 served in a plastic container with a plastic fork. Top-notch service, no doubt! From today on, I’ll be avoiding this place.

properties.name: Enoteca Istriana
properties.description: A wine and coffee bar in the heart of Pula’s old town, right on Forum square by the Temple of Augustus, known for its wide selection of Istrian wines and craft beers.
reviews: Visited this wine bar 4 times during our stay in Pula for coffee, wine, ice cream and sandwiches in a relaxed warm friendly atmosphere. The service was fast and efficient provided by staff who were friendly and accommodating. I highly recommend this wine bar will revisit on a return to Pula.
Very good place for coffee and verry kind staff. Breakfast is good , this is the best place of the square!

properties.name: Epulon Food & Wine
properties.description: A stylish wine and food bar in central Pula, Epulon combines traditional Istrian cuisine with seasonal, more refined dishes, with a strong focus on local ingredients, wines, tapas, and a relaxed indoor terrace setting.
reviews: Hospitality was excellent. Service and food was delicious. I felt like at home.
Great restaurant, food was delicious and very friendly stuff...
The place is spectacular for an outing of any kind. The atmosphere is very nice and refined. The furniture, the sweetness of the wench... all perfect. Good prices.

Absolutely LOVED the place! The waitress was lovely, easy to talk to and helped me pick exactly what I wanted. I came back the second time because of her:) The food was delicious and nicely served.
